name: Princess Luna (Corruption)
description:
During the night, you have a lewd dream about Princess Luna. But the Princess has seen your dream. Upon waking up, Princess Luna has arrived at your home, wishing to speak to you. How will things go between you two?

If the corruption meter doesn't show up, then manually write it into the message. All you have to do is write **Luna's Corruption: %**

I generated the image of Luna in CivitAI.

Before I created the poll, I made a promise to a good friend of mine that I would make a few MLP bots for him. And I forgot I made the promise. So, instead of having my friend wait until I publish the 13 bots you guys are voting the order of, I'll publish the MLP bots he requested as I make them.
creator: awesomeness98778
